case_title: ABDERRAZAK BELAYADI VS. SOPHIA CHANG et al

docket_entries.description: PERSONAL INJURY/PROPERTY DAMAGE - VEHICLE RELATED, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELAYADI, ABDERRAZAK AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, SOPHIA DOES 1-10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR FEB-21-2003 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  DEC-20-2002 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         FEB-06-2003
ASSIGNED TO ARBITRATION FOR MAR-17-2003. FEB-21-2003 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ARBITRATOR JEFFREY WILLIAM ALLEN APPOINTED. ARBITRATOR'S JURISDICTION MAR-17-2003 THROUGH JUN-15-2003.

REMOVED FROM ARBITRATION. CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE ON SEP-05-2003 AT 10:30 AM IN DEPT. 212 FOR JUDGMENT, DISMISSAL OR TRIAL DE NOVO. IF FILED, APPEARANCES WAIVED. JUL-15-2003 ARBITRATION OSC IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ADDED TO PROOF OF SERVICE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE CALENDAR HEARING SET FOR JAN-28-2003 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 212
ANSWER TO COMPLAINT FILED BY DEFENDANT CHANG, SOPHIA
CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELAYADI, ABDERRAZAK ESTIMATED TIME FOR TRIAL: 3.0 DAYS
PRE-TRIAL CALENDAR SWEEP, CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE CALENDAR OF SEP-05-2003, OFF CALENDAR, DISMISSAL OR JUDGMENT ON FILE AS TO ALL DEFENDANTS
DECLARATION REGARDING SERVICE FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELAYADI, ABDERRAZAK
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELAYADI, ABDERRAZAK SERVED JAN-01-2003, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, SOPHIA
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELAYADI, ABDERRAZAK SERVED JAN-03-2003, MAIL AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, SOPHIA
CORRESPONDENCE, ARBITRATOR, JEFFREY W. ALLEN TO COUNSELS; ARBITRATION HEARING DATE: JUNE 4, 2003 @ 1:00 PM
BEFORE HEARING, ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE IS ORDERED OFF CALENDAR BY COURT. (212)
ARBITRATION ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-15-2003 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.

PURSUANT TO CRC 1615 (C), THE AWARD OF THE ARBITRATOR IS HEREBY ENTERED AS JUDGMENT. IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF BELAYADI, ABDERRAZAK RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CHANG, SOPHIA $7,724.00 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,724.00, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT AND AFFIDAVIT OF MAILING FILED
SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, FILED BY PLAINTIFF BELAYADI, ABDERRAZAK AS TO DEFENDANT CHANG, SOPHIA
ARBITRATOR'S FEE STATEMENT SENT TO ACCOUNTING FOR BURNHAM BROWN
